CHART 385
The native will be a learned man. He will have a job in an industrial
concern. One of his brothers will give him lot of trouble between his 27th and
30th year. The native will be of dogged nature and will never be able to
adjust himself to his environments. He will quarrel with brothers and get
separated. His wife will bring him ill-fame. He will get good job at 24-25, and
